name: Thornwall Canyon
description: A narrow canyon with steep walls. Excellent for funneling enemies into kill zones, but limited expansion space requires careful planning.

spawnPoints.name: Canyon Mouth
spawnPoints.description: Primary enemy spawn point at the narrow canyon entrance

spawnPoints.name: Hidden Path
spawnPoints.description: Smaller enemy groups find this mountain trail

spawnPoints.name: Clifftop
spawnPoints.description: Flying enemies and siege weapons deploy here

spawnPoints.name: Cave Exit
spawnPoints.description: Underground tunnelers emerge here in later waves

strategy.defensive: Control the western entrance with overlapping tower fields
strategy.economic: Build efficiently in limited central space

tips: Build towers on elevated positions for range bonus
River provides natural enemy movement penalty
Stone walls are essential - wood won't survive late waves
Keep eastern flank covered but prioritize west
